description_long: This is a grand piano with a sleek, black polished exterior and a classic curved body. The lid is propped open, revealing the intricate string and soundboard arrangement inside, as well as the wooden inner rim. The keyboard features a full set of white and black keys, and three metallic pedals are visible beneath the keyboard. The piano stands on three tapered legs, giving it an elegant and stable appearance. The surface finish is glossy, reflecting light and emphasizing the smoothness of the material. No visible brand or logo markings are present, and there is no music stand attached.
description: A glossy black grand piano with an open lid, full keyboard, and three pedals, standing on three tapered legs.
description_view_0: Side view showing the open lid, exposed strings, and the full keyboard.
description_view_1: Rear angled view highlighting the closed portion of the lid and the piano's curved body.
description_view_2: Top-down side view with the lid fully covering the piano, obscuring the keyboard and interior.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the full keyboard, three pedals, and the open lid partially revealing the interior.
attribute_keyboard_layout: Standard 88-key layout with alternating white and black keys, no missing or non-standard keys.
